title: lytac_v1 — LYTAC sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/lytac_sim.py. One row per LYTAC degrader: the mass-action surface ternary capture (target-warhead, shuttling-receptor glycan ligand), the receptor-mediated internalisation rate, the endosomal sort-vs-recycle trafficking partition (lysosomal_partition = k_sort/(k_sort+k_recycle)), and the steady-state degradation flux. LYTAC is a SUB-AXIS :> BIFUNCTIONAL (expansion-main, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape @D sub_under_bifunctional) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis. Research-stage modality, in-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

lytac.description: LYTAC identifier within the deterministic panel.

shuttling_receptor.description: Lysosome-shuttling cell-surface receptor recruited (e.g. CI-M6PR, ASGPR).

drug_precedent.description: Own precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived). LYTAC is research-stage.

kd_receptor_nM.description: LYTAC glycan ligand <-> shuttling-receptor dissociation constant (nM).

theta_target.description: Mass-action fractional occupancy of the target by LYTAC.

theta_receptor.description: Mass-action fractional occupancy of the shuttling receptor.

lysosomal_partition.description: Fraction of internalised complex sorted to the lysosome = k_sort/(k_sort+k_recycle).

recycled_partition.description: Fraction of internalised complex recycled to the surface = k_recycle/(k_sort+k_recycle).

trafficking_class.description: Trafficking classification by the lysosomal partition.

degradation_flux_per_min.description: Steady-state lysosomal degradation flux = receptor_ternary_occupancy * k_int * lysosomal_partition (per min).
